final_answer: I don't have access to any airline reservation system or booking tools to cancel or modify reservations on your behalf. To cancel reservations IFOYYZ and NQNU5R and upgrade reservation M20IZO to business class using your card ending in 7334, you'll need to contact the airline directly through their website, app, or customer service phone line and manage these changes yourself.
